<!-- GENERATED by sphinxpress. Do not edit by hand. -->

<section id="installation">
<h1>Installation</h1>
<section id="requirements">
<h2>Requirements</h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Python &gt;= 3.10</p></li>
<li><p>click &gt;= 8.0.0</p></li>
<li><p>rich &gt;= 13.0.0</p></li>
<li><p>ebooklib &gt;= 0.18</p></li>
<li><p>beautifulsoup4 &gt;= 4.12.0</p></li>
<li><p>defusedxml &gt;= 0.7.1</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="optional-dependencies">
<h2>Optional Dependencies</h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>lxml</strong>: For better HTML parsing performance</p></li>
<li><p><strong>phrasplit</strong>: For sentence-level and clause-level formatting (depends on spaCy)</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="basic-installation">
<h2>Basic Installation</h2>
<p>Install epub2text from PyPI:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>pip<span class="w"> </span>install<span class="w"> </span>epub2text
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="installation-with-extras">
<h2>Installation with Extras</h2>
<p>For better HTML parsing performance:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>pip<span class="w"> </span>install<span class="w"> </span>epub2text<span class="o">[</span>lxml<span class="o">]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>After installing, download a spaCy language model:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>python<span class="w"> </span>-m<span class="w"> </span>spacy<span class="w"> </span>download<span class="w"> </span>en_core_web_sm
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>For all optional features:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>pip<span class="w"> </span>install<span class="w"> </span>epub2text<span class="o">[</span>lxml,sentences<span class="o">]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="development-installation">
<h2>Development Installation</h2>
<p>Clone the repository and install in development mode:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>git<span class="w"> </span>clone<span class="w"> </span>https://github.com/buchwandler/epub2text
<span class="nb">cd</span><span class="w"> </span>epub2text
pip<span class="w"> </span>install<span class="w"> </span>-e<span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;.[dev]&quot;</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>This installs all development dependencies including:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>pytest for testing</p></li>
<li><p>ruff for linting</p></li>
<li><p>pre-commit for code quality hooks</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="running-tests">
<h2>Running Tests</h2>
<p>Run the test suite:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>pytest<span class="w"> </span>tests/
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Run with coverage:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>pytest<span class="w"> </span>tests/<span class="w"> </span>--cov<span class="o">=</span>epub2text<span class="w"> </span>--cov-report<span class="o">=</span>html
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="pre-commit-hooks">
<h2>Pre-commit Hooks</h2>
<p>Install pre-commit hooks for code quality:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>pre-commit<span class="w"> </span>install
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Run hooks manually:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>pre-commit<span class="w"> </span>run<span class="w"> </span>--all-files
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
